query:
SELECT 
  s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.monthlyCost,
  s.customerName, s.phoneNumber, s.quantity,
  c.name as customerDisplayName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.provider = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.status NOT IN ('terminated','archived')
ORDER BY CAST(s.monthlyCost AS DECIMAL) DESC
LIMIT 20;
